viewAllEntrantsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if all entrants are displayed for an event

Test to see if all entrants in the chosen list are displayed for an event
viewConfirmedEntrantsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if all entrants in the confirmed list are displayed for an event
viewDeclinedEntrantsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if all entrants iin the declined list are displayed for an event
ViewEventActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_view_event screen this is the activity that shows event Information to Entrants It has the controllers that let the Entrant signup/leave the waitlist
ViewEventActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivity
 
ViewEventActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of the ViewEventActivity this is the activity that shows event Information to Entrants It has the controllers that let the Entrant signup/leave the waitlist
ViewEventActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
 
viewEventScreenDisplayTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
Test if the display is correct when given an event
viewEventsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HomeActivityTest
Test to see if events are loaded from database and is displayed to the user
viewEventsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HostedEventsActivityTest
Test to see if all hosted events are loaded from database and is displayed to the user
viewEventsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivityTest
Test to see if all signed-up events are loaded from database and is displayed to the user
viewWaitingListEntrantsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if all entrants in the waiting list are displayed for an event
